# ConvoSatya

ConvoSatya is a cybersecurity startup building AI-powered tools for scam detection, scam prevention, and post-scam reporting.

The company's current product is FAUST, an AI-powered conversational scam detection system designed to identify suspicious conversations, phishing attempts, impersonation scams, social engineering, and scam patterns across multiple messages.

## Product

FAUST analyzes conversations across multiple turns instead of judging only a single message. It is designed for scams that develop gradually through trust-building, urgency, impersonation, emotional pressure, malicious links, suspicious phone numbers, suspicious emails, or fake brand claims.

FAUST can help analyze:
- phishing scams
- brand impersonation scams
- fake bank alerts
- delivery scams
- tech support scams
- romance scams
- investment scams
- job scams
- account verification scams
- other conversational social engineering attempts

## Core capabilities

- Conversational scam detection
- Multi-turn message analysis
- Phishing and impersonation detection
- URL, phone number, email, and brand verification
- Risk signals based on urgency, manipulation, impersonation, and suspicious contact channels
- User-friendly safety advice
